creator: phil.vuchetich@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 254212
dmesg after install of 14.1-STABLE snapshot 20241010

The Lenovo P15v Gen 3 AMD boots and installs from FreeBSD-14.1-STABLE-amd64-20241010-a92626b33e17-269048-memstick.img

This bug preventing bootup is resolved based on this observation.
